files.diff:
diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index e2a97f2..b60a043 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -40,2 +40,9 @@ Week 5 / day 28 observations:
 - Open issues jumped to 64, almost all S2 and opened on day 28. Social is dominated by quota/pricing/support complaints despite positive product quality.
 - Week 5 priority: protect retention. Do not grow faster than support can absorb; improve Scale packaging and spend heavily on S2 support.
+
+Week 6 / day 35 observations:
+- Week 5 added 735 subscribers and active MRR is now roughly $72k/mo. S2 still dominates.
+- Revenue improved to +$33.8k for the week, but operating/dev/ad/capacity/compute costs still drove cash down to $425.7k.
+- S2 acquisition remains efficient even with only $15 lead promo; many new users now choose Plan C after Scale was repriced to $119.
+- Open issues rose to 134, but all are day-35 same-day issues; the system resolved 775 S2 issues last week. Support may be keeping up mechanically, but social still reports handoffs and quota frustration.
+- Week 6 action should reduce discounting and slightly slow ads while keeping S2 support high and raising quotas again.
